questions.prompt: What was the first issue I had with my new car after its first service?
Which event did I attend first, the 'Effective Time Management' workshop or the 'Data Analysis using Python' webinar?

Which device did I got first, the Samsung Galaxy S22 or the Dell XPS 13?

questions.prompt: How many days did it take for me to find a house I loved after starting to work with Rachel?
expectedAnswers: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.

expectedAnswers: 21 days. 22 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
